/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/Meteo.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Meteo.dir/src/weatherAPI.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Meteo.dir/src/weatherUI.cpp.o -o Meteo  /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libcurl.tbd /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libcurl.tbd
